summary: Iteration 164 - Tested Occasion Box Builder feature. Backend APIs verified working (9/9 tests passed). Frontend browser testing limited due to dashboard page memory constraints causing browser crashes.
action_items: Manual verification recommended: Login as dipali@clubconcierge.in, navigate to dashboard, scroll to 'My Celebrations' section, click 'Build Birthday Box' or 'Build Gotcha Box' button, verify modal opens with template loaded (not 'Box Not Available' error)
critical_code_review_comments: OccasionBoxBuilder.jsx: Uses key prop correctly to force remount on occasion type change (line 423 in MyCelebrations.jsx)
OccasionBoxBuilder.jsx: useEffect properly resets state and fetches data when isOpen/occasionType change (lines 92-103)
Birthday Box: 4 categories (cake, accessories, treats, toys) with 70 total products
Gotcha Day Box: 3 categories (treats, toys, photo) with 30 total products

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully test - browser crashes on dashboard page due to memory constraints

seed_data_creation: None - using existing occasion box templates (birthday-box, gotcha-day-box)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for Occasion Box Builder are fully working. Browser automation crashes on dashboard page due to memory constraints (1.32MB bundle size). Manual testing or lighter browser automation needed for frontend verification.

GET /api/occasion-boxes/by-occasion/gotc.returns: Gotcha Day Box template with 3 categories

GET /api/occasion-boxes/birthday-box/pro.returns: 70 products across 4 categories (cake: 20, accessories: 20, treats: 20, toys: 10)

OccasionBoxBuilder.jsx.fix_applied: key prop and state reset on modal open
OccasionBoxBuilder.jsx.status: Code looks correct - should resolve 'Box Not Available' error

browser_automation_notes: Dashboard page causes browser crashes due to large bundle size (1.32MB). Shop page loads successfully. This is an environmental limitation, not a code issue.
